description_long: This is an upright piano with a dark, rich wooden exterior and ornate carved details on the side panels and legs. The front features a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and three metallic pedals are visible at the base. The back of the piano reveals the internal wooden structure, with vertical slats and compartments typical of upright pianos. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing small objects or sheet music. The wood finish is glossy, giving the piano a polished and elegant appearance. No visible brand or logo is present, and the lid is fully closed, concealing the strings and hammers inside.
description: A dark wooden upright piano with ornate carvings, a full keyboard, and three pedals, featuring a glossy finish and a closed lid.
description_view_0: Side view showing the paneled woodwork and ornate leg carvings, with the keyboard partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full keyboard, three pedals, and decorative wood panels above the keys.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, highlighting the carved leg and paneled woodwork.
description_view_3: Rear view exposing the internal wooden slats and compartments, with no keys or pedals visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard layout with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
